snippets.text:
Background/aim

Lactose intolerance (LI) is a common clinical condition associated with reduced lactase enzyme activity.

citation.title: Frequency and Diagnostic Utility of the -13910C>T <i>MCM6</i> Gene Polymorphism for Lactose Intolerance in a Brazilian Northeast Population.

snippets.text: The oral lactose tolerance test (OLTT), although widely used for diagnosis, has several limitations such as fasting, multiple blood collections, and gastrointestinal discomfort.

citation.title: Frequency and Diagnostic Utility of the -13910C>T <i>MCM6</i> Gene Polymorphism for Lactose Intolerance in a Brazilian Northeast Population.
